moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The climax of the 2026 FIFA World Cup sees Spain and Argentina battle it out for global football supremacy in New Jersey, USA.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Sunday. The World Cup Final. Spain vs Argentina. Who lifts the trophy? It’s going to be HUGE.

angles.name: Team Focus
angles.copy: Messi's Argentina aiming for a fourth title, or Spain making it two? The stakes couldn't be higher for the 2026 World Cup Final.

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's four majors, is underway at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running from July 16-19.

angles.name: Live Action
angles.copy: The Open Championship is LIVE! Who's making moves on the leaderboard at Royal Birkdale today?

angles.name: Weekend Golf
angles.copy: Golf fans, tune in! The Open Championship is in full swing at Royal Birkdale this weekend. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

moments.title: Latitude Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th edition with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Latitude Festival kicks off next week! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park?

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi... Latitude's 20th anniversary lineup is stacked! Get ready for a weekend of incredible music and arts.

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026 in full swing
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, is ongoing, with new episodes airing six nights a week from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Daily Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! Who's coupled up and who's on the rocks tonight?

angles.name: Fan Reactions
angles.copy: Catching up on Love Island? The villa is heating up! What are your predictions for the next recoupling?

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays 2026
moments.blurb: Schools across England, Wales, and Scotland are breaking up or have already broken up for the long summer holiday, with many starting this week.

angles.name: Holiday Kick-off
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for many! Who's excited for weeks of sunshine, fun, and maybe a staycation?

angles.name: Travel Plans
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're hitting the roads or skies, safe travels and enjoy your well-deserved break!

moments.title: Happy Birthday M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A. turns 51 on July 18th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible M.I.A. turns 51! Still bringing those 'Paper Planes' vibes. Happy Birthday!

angles.name: Artist Influence
angles.copy: From 'Galang' to 'Bad Girls', M.I.A. has consistently pushed boundaries. Wishing a very happy 51st birthday for tomorrow!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Dr. Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen's Legacy
angles.copy: From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', Brian May's riffs are iconic. Wishing Queen's guitarist a very happy 79th birthday on Sunday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Rock and blues guitar icon Carlos Santana turns 79 on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Master
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana! Still making guitars sing after all these years.

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: From Woodstock to 'Smooth', Carlos Santana's sound is unmistakable. Wishing him a very happy 79th birthday on Monday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on July 21st.

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the voice behind 'Hotel California' and so many more, Don Henley! What's your favourite Eagles track?

angles.name: Solo & Band Hits
angles.copy: From the Eagles to his solo career, Don Henley has given us countless classics. Wishing him a very happy 79th birthday on Tuesday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez turns 34 on July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Star & Actress
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the multi-talented Selena Gomez! From Disney to chart-topper, she does it all.

angles.name: Career Highlights
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 34th birthday to Selena Gomez on Wednesday! What's your favourite Selena song or role?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist Slash, born Saul Hudson, turns 61 on July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the top hat-wearing guitar god, Slash! What's your go-to GNR track to blast?

angles.name: Legendary Riffs
angles.copy: From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'November Rain', Slash's riffs are unforgettable. Wishing him a very happy 61st birthday on Thursday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: JLo's Day
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only JLo! Still bringing the heat to the dancefloor and the big screen.

angles.name: Jenny from the Block
angles.copy: From 'On The Floor' to 'Love Don't Cost a Thing', JLo is a true icon. Wishing her a very happy 57th birthday on Friday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, turns 83 on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger! Still got the moves and the voice.

angles.name: Stones Forever
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday? The ultimate rock and roll frontman!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Bill Berry
moments.blurb: Former R.E.M. drummer Bill Berry turns 68 on July 27th.

angles.name: REM Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to Bill Berry, the driving force behind R.E.M.'s classic sound!

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 68th birthday to R.E.M.'s Bill Berry on Monday! What's your favourite R.E.M. anthem?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official Charts Company releases the latest UK Singles Chart, with 'Summer Vibe' by The Weeknd ft. Ariana Grande currently holding the top spot. (Hypothetical Chart Topper)

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: This week's UK Number 1 is 'Summer Vibe' by The Weeknd ft. Ariana Grande! Is it on your playlist? (Hypothetical)

angles.name: New Entries
angles.copy: Any new entries shaking up the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Tune in to Nation Hits to hear the biggest tracks! (Hypothetical)
